Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string to track the current version of the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates dynamic strings with timestamps for better data handling.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy of time-related data displayed in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by quickly accessing version information.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Enhances string handling by optimizing how timestamps are processed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of data processing in games, leading to quicker responses and smoother gameplay.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagPeoplePageCardMenuUseVisibleProperty_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Utilizes a visibility property for the card menu on the people page.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Enhances user experience by ensuring that only relevant options are displayed, making navigation simpler.

Added_Network.name: FStringNetStackDummyClientEnabledMinorVersions_Staged
